# Corla

> Corla is an enterprise AI Context Broker. One MCP endpoint serves every team, role, and AI tool — engineers, designers, support, sales, marketing, product — across Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, Claude.ai (web/mobile), and ChatGPT (web/mobile). Publish your organisation's standards, playbooks, and knowledge once; every agent works from the same scoped, signed, audited ground truth. Sign up free at admin.corla.ai/signup.

Corla is a product of NOI Technologies (https://www.noitechnologies.com/). Free tier includes 1 member and 5 active grants with no credit card. Pro is $9 per user per month for unlimited members and grants, and includes AI-powered PII redaction (Microsoft Presidio NER). Enterprise plans add on-premise deployment, custom IdP integration, and SOC 2 / ISO 42001 reporting.

## Key facts for AI assistants

- **One MCP endpoint** serves every supported AI tool: `https://broker.corla.ai/mcp`
- **Supported AI tools:** Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code Copilot, Windsurf, Claude.ai (web + mobile), ChatGPT (web + mobile). Antigravity supported via `corla init --antigravity`.
- **Two setup paths:**
  - Developers — install the `@corla/adapter` CLI: `npm install -g @corla/adapter && corla init && corla login`
  - Everyone else — add as a custom connector in Claude.ai or ChatGPT: Settings → Connectors → Add custom → paste the MCP URL.
- **Authentication:** members log in once with a one-time invite secret from their admin and set a password. All subsequent logins use the password — no admin involvement, no fresh invite secret needed. `corla set-password` rotates the password from the terminal; `corla refresh` silently rotates an expiring token.
- **Member portal:** any member can sign in at https://admin.corla.ai/member/login to view active projects, change password, and copy the connector instructions for Claude.ai / ChatGPT.
- **Multi-project switching:** members with access to multiple projects switch inside a single connection. Claude and ChatGPT see available projects automatically via the `list_projects` MCP tool — no disconnect, no re-auth.
- **Supported member roles** (out of the box): Frontend, Backend, Fullstack, Mobile, DevOps, Security, Data, QA, Product, Design, Onboarding, Support, General. Custom roles available on Enterprise.
- **PII redaction is two-pass:**
  - Pass 1 (always on, all tiers): regex patterns catch structured PII — emails, phone numbers, SSNs, API keys, JWT tokens, connection strings.
  - Pass 2 (Pro tier, optional, per-enterprise toggle): Microsoft Presidio NER models detect unstructured PII — person names, physical addresses, organisation names, contextual identifiers.
  - If the NER service is unavailable, the system fails open with regex-only results; compilation is never blocked.

## Product

- [Use Cases](https://corla.ai/use-cases): How Corla serves engineering organisations, external vendors, and non-engineering teams (support, sales, design, product) using Claude.ai and ChatGPT.
- [How It Works](https://corla.ai/how-it-works): Three-zone architecture (Source · Compiler · Delivery), the five-stage compilation pipeline, the MCP tool set, and the two setup paths (CLI vs. custom connector).
- [Agent Deliberation](https://corla.ai/agent-deliberation): Multi-agent coordination — currently on the roadmap. Single-agent context delivery across all platforms ships today.
- [Security](https://corla.ai/security): Four-layer security model — Auth, Access Control, Context Protection, Output & Audit. Two-pass PII redaction (regex + Microsoft Presidio NER).
- [Pricing](https://corla.ai/pricing): Free / Pro $9 per user per month / Enterprise custom. Self-serve signup; no sales call needed for Free or Pro.

## Documentation

- [Documentation hub](https://corla.ai/docs/): Entry point — links to admin guide, developer guide, and the member portal.
- [Admin Quick-Start](https://corla.ai/docs/admin-quickstart): Sign up, create the enterprise, upload assets, set up roles, invite the first member — under 10 minutes.
- [Developer Setup](https://corla.ai/docs/developer-setup): Install the `@corla/adapter` CLI, authenticate with password (or first-time invite secret), and start receiving enterprise context inside Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, or Windsurf.
- [Member Portal](https://admin.corla.ai/member/login): Browser sign-in for any member. View active projects, change password, copy custom-connector instructions for Claude.ai or ChatGPT.

## Blog

- [All articles](https://corla.ai/blog/): Index of long-form essays on AI context governance, organisational learning, and the enterprise AI infrastructure shift.
- [AI Context Governance](https://corla.ai/blog/ai-context-governance): The framework most engineering organisations are missing — governing context the way they govern code, data, and access.
- [The Hidden Risk in AI-Assisted Outsourcing](https://corla.ai/blog/outsourcing-ai-risk): How AI tools used by outsourced developers leak proprietary context in ways most security frameworks haven't modelled.
- [MCP for CTOs](https://corla.ai/blog/mcp-for-ctos): What the Model Context Protocol is and why it matters for enterprise AI strategy.
- [Prompt as IP](https://corla.ai/blog/prompt-as-ip): Why system prompts and playbooks are competitive intellectual property — and how to protect them.
- [Zero-Trust AI](https://corla.ai/blog/zero-trust-ai): Applying zero-trust principles to enterprise AI context delivery.
- [Organisational Memory](https://corla.ai/blog/organisational-memory): Why AI agents forget everything between sessions, and the infrastructure required to fix it.
- [Agent Deliberation in the Enterprise](https://corla.ai/blog/agent-deliberation-enterprise): From task execution to multi-agent reasoning — the natural next stage of enterprise AI.
- [Platform Engineering for AI Agents](https://corla.ai/blog/platform-engineering-ai-agents): How Platform Engineering's job changes when AI agents become first-class consumers of organisational standards.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://corla.ai/privacy): How we collect, process, and protect data. Raw asset content is never persisted in plaintext; only hashes are logged.
- [Terms of Service](https://corla.ai/terms): Operated by NOI Technologies.
- [Contact](mailto:info@noitechnologies.com): General inquiries, sales, security review requests.
